ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot admiring a mountain, using both arms to frame the view. The sequence starts with the arms at the sides, then moves to a framing pose, and then back to rest.  The movement should be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the awe-inspiring nature of the mountain. The robot's arms don't have elbows, so the framing will be achieved by rotating the arms outward and pitching them slightly upward.  The sequence will avoid jerky movements and should feel smooth and natural.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to frame
both arms lift and spread wide, framing the view
arms rise higher, embracing the grand vista
arms return to rest, the mountain admired
